text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Maybe it's because I ate a really big dinner last
night, then went to bed a bit earlier than usual.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Back home, everyone always used to say, "Early
to bed and early to rise, makes a person healthy,
wealthy and wise."

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Exercising in the morning helps a lot too.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It's a relief to see Oguri Cap so full of life.
